ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Conversation ID of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was created */,
  "timezone" INTEGER /* Timezone of the tweet */,
  "place" TEXT /* Location of the tweet */,
  "tweet" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "cashtags" TEXT /* Cashtags used in the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "edit_history" TEXT /* JSON column to store the edit history of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Numeric value representing the sentiment of the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Numeric value representing the overall engagement */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet if this is a retweet */,
  "user_mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user mentions in the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* The number of users the user is following */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Text field for the user's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* The user's website URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The date and time the user was last active */,
  "role" TEXT /* The user's role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the popularity of the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" TEXT /* Numeric value representing the trend of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cashtags" (
  "cashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cashtag */,
  "cashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the cashtag */,
  "stock_price" TEXT /* The current stock price associated with the cashtag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time the stock price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_cashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "cashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "cashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL used in the tweet */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the URL */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the URL */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the photo */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the photo */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_photos_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_videos_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was retweeted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "retweet_text" TEXT /* The text of the retweet (if different from the original) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who replied */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was posted */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* The number of replies the tweet has */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* The text of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was liked */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* The number of likes the tweet has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used to collect tweets */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the search query was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time the search query was last updated */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* The type of search (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "search_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the search is performed (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "near" (
  "near_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location near which the tweets were collected */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "radius" TEXT /* Radius around the location within which tweets were collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("near_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the tweet */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "radius" TEXT /* Radius around the geographic location within which tweets were collected */,
  "place_type" TEXT /* The type of place (e.g., city, country, neighborhood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)
